zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Furnival於1265年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire36歲，母親Maud FitzJohn29歲。他於大約1275年1月與Joan Despenser在英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1294年登記服兵役。他於1295年被列為member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale)。他去世於1332年4月18日之前，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Furnival于1265年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire36岁，母亲Maud FitzJohn29岁。他于大约1275年1月与Joan Despenser在英国英格兰越可爾雪菲爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1294年登记服兵役。他于1295年被列为member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale)。他去世于1332年4月18日之前，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾雪菲爾。

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Furnival was born in 1265, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire, was 36 and his mother, Maud FitzJohn, was 29. He married Joan Despenser about January 1275, in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1294. In 1295, his occupation is listed as member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale). He died before 18 April 1332, and was buried in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Furnival est né en 1265, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maud FitzJohn, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan Despenser environ janvier 1275, à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1294. En 1295, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale). Il est décédé avant 18 avril 1332, et a été enterré à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Furnival 1265 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire 36 und seine Mutter Maud FitzJohn 29. Er hat um Januar 1275 in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1294 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1295 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale) aufgeführt. Er starb vor 18. April 1332 und wurde in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Furnival è nato il nel 1265 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Maud FitzJohn, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan Despenser circa gennaio 1275, nel Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1294. Nel 1295, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale). Morì prima del 18 aprile 1332, e fu sepolto a Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Furnivalが1265年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshireは36歳，母Maud FitzJohnは29歳であった。約1275年1月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドでJoan Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1294年に兵役登録をした。1295年，職業はmember of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale)と記録されている。彼は1332年4月18日以前に死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Westmor: 영국 웨스트모를랜드 샤프 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Furnival(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud FitzJohn(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셰필드에서 Joan Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1295년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale)이었다. 그는 1332년 4월 18일 이전 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셰필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Furnival nasceu em 1265, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maud FitzJohn, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Despenser aproximadamente janeiro de 1275, em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1294. Em 1295, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale). Ele faleceu antes 18 de abril de 1332, e foi sepultado em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Westmor: ст мэри магдеилине'с эбби, шап, вестморланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Furnival родился в 1265 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud FitzJohn, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Despenser около январь 1275 г. в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1294 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1295 годуработал по профессии member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale). Он умер перед 18 апрель 1332 г. и был похоронен в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Furnival nació en 1265, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Furnival Lord of Hallamshire, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maud FitzJohn, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joan Despenser aproximadamente enero de 1275, en Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1294. En 1295, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament (summoned by writs directed to 'thome de furnival' or 'de fournivall' with the addition, on and after 25 august 1318, of seniori, whereby he is held to have become lord furnivale). Murió antes de 18 de abril de 1332, y fue sepultado en Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
